title: Dried Resinous Syrian Runner Beans Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful stew featuring runner beans, inspired by Syrian cuisine, with a rich resinous flavor and a dairy-free friendly twist.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning.
Stir in the cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the soaked and drained runner beans, and the vegetable broth to the pot.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the beans are tender.
Use a whisk to mash some of the beans and thicken the stew, if desired.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired.
